title: Usopp Is Hurt
description: Luffy, Zoro, Sanji, and Chopper strike back after Usopp is beaten, turning the search for the stolen money into revenge.
scene: Across pages 6, 7, 8, 9, this part follows Luffy, Usopp, Nami, Zoro, Sanji. Luffy, Zoro, Sanji, and Chopper strike back after Usopp is beaten, turning the search for the stolen money into revenge.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: He broke through the Super armor!!!

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: OH MY GOD!! EVEN THE CANNON...!!!

summary: Luffy, Zoro, Sanji, and Chopper strike back after Usopp is beaten, turning the search for the stolen money into revenge.
